description: This file is a React component for displaying a featured products section in a Next.js frontend. It manages state, fetches product data from an API, handles loading/error states, and renders a responsive grid of product cards.

methods.name: mapApiProductToDisplay
methods.description: Maps a raw API product object to a formatted product suitable for display, including price conversion, slug creation, and badge assignment.

methods.name: loadProducts
methods.description: Asynchronously fetches products from the API, falls back to mock data if necessary, and updates component state accordingly.
